hero.title: Alejandro Ajenjo — front-end developer with 6+ years building product for the travel sector, based in València, Spain.

about.headline: Passionate web developer with over 6 years of experience
about.p1: I'm Alejandro Ajenjo Rodríguez, a web developer with over 6 years of experience building applications in the tourism and vacation rental sector. I specialise in front-end development, crafting clean, functional and well-designed interfaces.
about.p2: Throughout my career I've collaborated with agile teams, working with technologies like HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, PHP and MySQL. I enjoy both the visual detail and back-end integration, always seeking the most efficient solution.
